case_title: LU VACCARO VS. ALCATRAZ BIKES & TOURS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VACCARO, LU IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALCATRAZ BIKES & TOURS MOHAMED BELAYADI  (OWNER) ALLAEDDINE, BEDDAR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VACCARO, LU ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED APR-03-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALCATRAZ BIKES & TOURS MOHAMED BELAYADI  (OWNER)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-16-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-16-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG . PLAINTIFF LU VACCARO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALCATRAZ BIKES & TOURS IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ALLAEDDINE BEDDAR, OWNER. DEFENDANT ALLAEDDINE BEDDAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALLAEDDINE BEDDAR WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-16-2018 - JUDGMENT.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,680.00 FILED BY VACCARO, LU AS TO DEFENDANT ALCATRAZ BIKES & TOURS MOHAMED BELAYADI  (OWNER) ALLAEDDINE, BEDDAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
